raw_consumer_statement: I took out a personal loan for credit card debt. On XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX Bank sent a check to Citibank in the amount of {$9800.00} on my behalf. The check was # XXXX, it was reconciled on XX/XX/XXXX and Citibank still has not applied it to my account. They are charging me interest. Everytime I call they say I need to send proof that it was paid. I went to XXXX XXXX and they have given me proof of payment which I have mailed and emailed. My last conversation they said they want an actual picture of the check which I didnt write, it was from the bank. They are stealing from me and I dont know what to do.
